meta.siteDescription: Motion designer building campaigns, products, and collaborative creative environments.

hero.subtitle: Built across campaigns, products, and collaborative creative environments.

projects.title: Carrying the heat when it counts
projects.description: Brought in to fill a lead role on a high-visibility campaign — international markets, Times Square placement, high expectations. I delivered because motion at that scale is coordination as much as craft.

projects.title: Finding the language mid-flight
projects.description: I joined this campaign mid-sprint — no handover, a format I'd never worked in, and a deadline that didn't move. The brief asked for a blend of photorealistic and graphic visual languages, at scale, live on stage. Constraints became the design tool. The work held.

bio: Eight years working across agencies, freelance, and collaborative production environments. Experience building motion systems for campaigns, digital platforms, branded experiences, and large-format screens, often inside fast-moving projects with shifting requirements and timelines.
Focused on motion that functions beyond the final render: scalable, adaptable, and built for real-world production environments.

ai.body:
I've been exploring AI as a motion tool for visual exploration, asset generation, and early-stage concepting. Genuinely curious about where it takes the craft.

I believe it's most valuable when integrated into larger creative systems, accelerating iteration while leaving room for intentional design decisions and collaborative refinement.

contact.heading: I'm looking for a place where it means something — where I can push it forward alongside people who feel the same way.
contact.body: Open to opportunities. Drop an email and let's talk about what we can build together.
